raacSchools.note: Schools with RAAC (Reinforced Autoclaved Aerated Concrete) confirmed following emergency surveys, England.

poorCondition.note: Percentage of school buildings rated poor or very poor condition in DfE condition surveys.

rebuildCompletions.note: Priority Schools/School Rebuilding Programme annual completions.

metadata.methodology: RAAC figures from DfE management information releases following September 2023 emergency survey. Condition ratings from DfE condition survey (most recent large-scale survey 2017-19, updated estimates). Rebuild completions from Priority School Building Programme and School Rebuilding Programme quarterly updates.
knownIssues: Full condition survey not conducted since 2017-19 — current figures are estimates and projections
RAAC survey was rapid response — some schools may still have unidentified issues
School Rebuilding Programme target of 500 schools over 10 years represents a fraction of total need
